Quick help

  • Why does one and the same legal event/entry refer to different dates?

26.09.2025 Change - divisional application(s) published on  29.10.2025  [2025/44]
09.09.2025 Amendment by applicant
29.08.2025 Publication in section I.1 EP Bulletin published on  01.10.2025  [2025/40]
29.08.2025 The date on which the examining division becomes responsible, has been established
29.08.2025 Request for examination filed published on  01.10.2025  [2025/40]
08.07.2025 PCT data prior to European publication
